---
title: "Frances Ann How"
---

## Frances Ann How

**Dates:** (d. 28 Aug 1887)

**Maiden name:** (Douglas)

### Description

wife of the Rt. Rev. William Walsham How

### Biography

She married (6 Nov 1849) William Walsham How, Bishop of Bedford, and died at Barmouth.  [How, <i>William Walsham How</i>]

### Letters

- Letter from St. Michael [29 September 1887]
- Letter from St Stephen\'s day [26 December] 1884

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
